name: AnalysisDesignParameter
summary: The AnalysisDesignParameter class contains information related to analysis design parameters.

constructors.name: AnalysisDesignParameter(Int32)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisDesignParameter class.

params.name: materialType
params.doc: The material type of the analysis design parameter.

constructors.name: AnalysisDesignParameter(String, Int32, Identifier, Double)
constructors.signature: public AnalysisDesignParameter(string analysisModelName, int parameterId, Identifier partId, double value)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisDesignParameter class.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies an analysis design parameter. The ID has to be set.

properties.name: AnalysisModelName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model name.

properties.name: AnalysisObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the analysis object.

properties.name: FatherObject2ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObject2Type
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: FatherObjectID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the analysis object.

properties.name: IsGeneral
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the design parameter is general.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of the analysis design parameter.

properties.name: Unit
properties.summary: Gets or sets the unit of the analysis design parameter.

properties.name: Value
properties.summary: Gets or sets the value of the analysis design parameter.
